description_long: This is a wide, cylindrical bracelet crafted from a metallic, bronze-colored material. The exterior is adorned with a series of evenly spaced, large, faceted blue gemstones set in rectangular bezels, giving it a bold and luxurious appearance. The surface of the metal features subtle engraved patterns and raised bands that add depth and texture to the design. The gemstones are highly polished, contrasting with the slightly matte finish of the metal. The interior is smooth and unadorned, designed for comfortable wear on the wrist. The overall style is geometric and modern, with a touch of opulence from the prominent gemstones.
description: A wide bronze-colored bracelet with large blue gemstones set in rectangular bezels, featuring engraved patterns and raised bands for a bold, geometric look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the bracelet, highlighting three prominent blue gemstones and the engraved bronze surface.
description_view_1: Angled side view emphasizes the depth of the bracelet and the raised bands, with multiple gemstones visible along the curve.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the circular opening and smooth interior, with the gemstones partially visible along the outer edge.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the alignment and spacing of the blue gemstones around the bracelet.
